---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-worldmap3.png')
background-size: 105%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size45[**I. Arguments, Evidence and International Relations**]

<br>

.size50[

**Today's Agenda**

Defining International Political Events
]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2024)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. Review and record participation submissions

2. Publish next discussion board

<br>

This week we'll be laying our foundations for the rest of the semester.

- Before we can really dig into explaining international politics, we need to get on the same page about what we are studying

- Today we focus on defining the key outcome IR tries to explain: international political events.




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size55[.content-box-white[**Assignment for Today**]]

.size40[
1. Find a **recent** "international political event" described in the news, and

2. **Before class** submit to Canvas:
    - An APA citation for your source, and 
    - Explain why this event is "international," "political" and "specific" (one sentence each).
]

???

For today, I sent out a group of highly motivated researchers to collect international politics case studies for us to examine.

### Has everybody submitted their case on Canvas?

<br>

Let's quickly zip around the room so you can introduce us to your chosen cases.

- In just a sentence or two tell us what you picked and why

- *Don't fill in details or generalize, just let them present!*



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size50[.content-box-white[**APA Web Citations**]]

<br>

.size35[
- Lastname, F. M. (Year, Month Date). *Title of page*. Site name. URL

- Group name. (Year, Month Date). *Title of page*. Site name. URL

- *Title of page*. (Year, Month Date). Site name. Retrieved Month Date, Year, from URL

- Author or Group name. (n.d.). *Title of page*. Site name (if applicable). URL
]

???

Ok, now let's review our citations.

- This is the format you have to use on the papers you will submit in this class so we need to get up to speed on this.

- On this slide I've given you the Purdue OWL formatting instructions for various kinds of web sources.

- Everybody take a minute to review the APA citations in the discussion forum and let us know if any need to be revised.

### Any need fixing?

<br>

*Split class into groups of 5*

- Go sit with your groups!




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-worldmap3.png')
background-size: 105%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size60[
.content-box-purple[**Defining the Key Terms**]

- International

- Political

- Event
]

???

Ok groups, your job today is to use the examples collected by the class to define these three key concepts.

<br>

In 10 minutes I want each group to write their three definitions on the board.

- Complete sentences, be specific!

<br>

### Questions?

- Get to it!

<br>

*Share definitions, discuss and consolidate*



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-worldmap3.png')
background-size: 105%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size50[
.content-box-purple[**Defining the Key Terms**]

- International: With a global impact or involving more than one state.

- Political: ...?

- Event: A thing or happening
]

???

Here's one version we might consider that sort of holds off on the "politics" definition.

<br>

### Does every case we collected meet these definitions? Why or why not?

<br>

### Within our cases, do any sub-groupings stand out?

### - Cases that are similar in other important ways?




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[.content-box-white[**Assignment for Next Class**]]

<br>

.size60[
Donovan, T., & Hoover, K. (2014). "The Elements of Science." In *The Elements of Social Scientific Thinking*.
]
